title: Viral Preparation
author: Aditya Mohan
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8iahuae

steps.title: Coat the plates with 1% Poly-L-Lysine...
steps.instruction: Coat the plates with 1% Poly-L-Lysine solution and leave in dry incubator overnight.

steps.title: Plate 6E6 HEK293 T cells overnight in DMEM media
steps.instruction: Plate 6E6 HEK293 T cells overnight in DMEM media

steps.title: In 2 1
steps.instruction: In 2 1.5 mL epindorph tube add 150 uL of OptiMEM. In one of them add 15 uL of lipofectamine. In the other add 10 uL of packaging plasmid and 10 uL of the plasmid of interest.

steps.title: Combine the two tubes together for...
steps.instruction: Combine the two tubes together for total volume ~ 300 uL and incubate for 5 minutes 00:05:00

steps.title: Remove the media from the plate...
steps.instruction: Remove the media from the plate and add the 300 uL dropwise. Add 1 ML of plain DMEM.

steps.title: Add 5 mL of DMEM based media
steps.instruction: Add 5 mL of DMEM based media.

steps.title: Remove the media and add to...
steps.instruction: Remove the media and add to an eppendorf tube stored in 4 degrees. Add another 5 mL of DMEM based media. 4 °C
